libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For 2.0.0 tests, use the Jakarta namespace (`jakarta.activation.*`), not the pre-2.x `javax.activation.*` imports from the existing 1.2.x tests.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The API POM states the artifact is intended only for compile-time API use and omits implementation-specific classes. Resolved classes such as MimetypesFileTypeMap and MailcapCommandMap reference com.sun.activation.registries.*, which are absent from jakarta.activation-api but present in the matching
...[truncated]

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The implementation artifact contains duplicate `jakarta.activation` classes as well as `com.sun.activation.registries`; classpath order could affect which duplicate class is loaded.
If tests avoid MailcapCommandMap, MimetypesFileTypeMap, FileTypeMap defaults, and similar runtime paths, they may compile without the implementation dependency but provide only shallow API coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0 is an API-only artifact; normal runtime coverage of activation maps needs the matching implementation classes.
